rows.description: Gwynne - Allowance at audit; Receipts and Stamps; Commission

Sub-amounts are written inline as part of the description and are NOT taken as the primary column amounts.

Main pounds column reads a three-digit number that I interpret as '202' with shillings '9' and pence '0'. The hundreds digit is slightly faint; chosen reading 202 9 0 because '202' fits alignment and yields valid shillings/pence.
